context_notes: CORRECTED AGAIN: the null space provides positivity but NOT the eps_0 decrease. eps_0 ~ 1/L from the signal cancellation tightening as L grows (M eigenvalues grow with L, W02-M cancellation in the 26x26 signal subspace improves). next_action: Track mu_k (signal M eigenvalues) and s1, s2 (W02 eigenvalues) as functions of L. The secular equation for the 26x26 signal subspace determines eps_0. Understanding how the roots move with L is the path to proving eps_0 -> 0.
